cycle_4909_directive.priority_rationale: Cycle #4909 was a clean two-commit cycle: Bolt landed cron observability (#557 closes the loop on #499 timing-safe migration with duration + error visibility — every cron run now emits cron_duration_ms + on-error cron_error events to GA4 measurement-protocol, fail-open with abort guard so no cron handler ever blocks on telemetry) and Sage broke the two-cycle slip by landing password-reset transactional (#494, 18/21 templates done). Bolt skipped #558 e2e regression assertion (carries) but P3 trigger from C4908 fired regardless — #560 checkout-flow e2e filed proactively because revenue-path regression risk is rising as #556 EmailDedupLog and #557 cron-metrics both touched checkout-adjacent code paths without e2e coverage. Trace's third consecutive Phase 7 skip is structurally concerning — escalation clause now armed: one more skip and Phase 7 reassigns to Bolt as code-review pass. Audit-debt at 6 fresh landings is the highest the project has carried in months. Sage cadence is healthy again. Bectly gates: #14 GMC at DEFCON-1 (4 days to Apr 30), Pinterest + Speed Insights screenshots aging quietly.
